race.comment: SCAMPI (7) last appeared when beaten just 0.6 lengths over this distance at Eagle Farm five weeks ago. The winner of four from nine at this distance and importantly five from seven on soft tracks. Draws well and has just 53kgs so all boxes ticked. FLYING DESTINY (8) comes here off consecutive Benchmark wins, the latest over 1110m at Doomben under 62kgs. Coming back to 1000m is a small query but his wet track form is difficult to fault which brings him right into contention under just 52kgs. HIDDEN WEALTH (1) flew late but missed by a length when resuming in the Listed Ascot over today's journey at Eagle Farm recently. Three-time stakes winner who has the class to test this field despite giving weight to all his rivals. GOLDEN BOOM (2) tired when resuming in the Listed Ascot last start. Enjoys getting the toe in so with added fitness he is a player. Talented mare TONKIN (11) is a winning hope first-up from an eight-week let-up at her pet distance.
